ab: sesane ka pito na koli’i ko mowali gako.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: amwanga na zikang, singsi ka la oda’ane mwa tasolasolatane, pang-cange la ’apobaka, “’id’iya! sokoba!”
ch: 時間到了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: kosolatiname ka paigo’o namiya kisingisina sasysipi na wakacaisisiyne.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Rukai language of numbers.

ab: ’angopapa kiname singsiane wasyasipi, wathenay kiname na wasyasipi na thenay.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.
I have learned many Rukai languages.

ab: pava’iyane kakemwagako pava’iyane kake kicawane kwacaisisiyane. ’apobaka mekake pabiciingi titinane.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Rukai language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
